notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch — continuing pattern of CDN/WAF bot protection blocking the monitoring environment (Cloudflare/Vercel shield). Simultaneous failure across all 8 domains confirms environment-level blocking, not genuine site outages. SSL GOOD NEWS: certs renewed since yesterday. April 21 expiry was 2026-05-21 (29 days, in warning zone). Today all certs report 2026-05-22 (30 days remaining), crossing back above the 30-day alert threshold — ssl_warnings drops to 0 today. Vercel appears to have auto-renewed certs between April 21–22. alerts_triggered remains true due to HTTP 403 down classification per spec.
